objectives.description: Determine whether Optimo Ventures should enter AI compliance automation market
Extend OptimoEvidence's evidence pre-processing engine into AI-native GRC for underserved SME/mid-market
Target healthcare AI compliance (GutWise domain) and AI agent governance (first-mover) as vertical-first beachheads
Build unified compliance data layer (RegGraph) consumable by all portfolio companies
Validate with 3+ enterprise design partners before Phase 2 build commitment

evidence.claim: AI compliance automation market: $5.96B (2026), 28.7% CAGR to $16.25B (2030)
Vanta valued at $4B, 1,500 employees, 400+ integrations, 35+ frameworks
Drata: 387% enterprise spend growth since Jan 2024
Direct moves between Vanta and Drata are exceptionally rare — compliance platforms are sticky
EU AI Act high-risk obligations take effect August 2026; SME compliance cost estimated at €300K-400K upfront
evidence.source: EU AI Act published text; EU Commission impact assessment

evidence.claim: Haast raised $17M at 4.5x revenue growth with zero churn in marketing compliance niche
FLORA raised $42M Series A for AI creative workflows; Poetic at $500M valuation
Vanta and Drata integration moats take 3-5 years and $50-100M+ to replicate
evidence.source: Analyst estimate based on integration count and funding history

evidence.claim: OptimoEvidence Phase 1 has 12 screens, 22-entity data model, packet state machine — mutation wiring outstanding

decisions.decision: DO NOT launch standalone AI compliance automation venture
decisions.rationale: Competitive defensibility score of 1/5 — Vanta ($4B) and Drata (387% enterprise growth) have near-impenetrable moats. Direct competition requires 3-5 years and $50-100M+. CONDITIONAL-GO only as OptimoEvidence extension.

decisions.decision: EXTEND OptimoEvidence as 'evidence integrity pre-processor' — NOT 'AI compliance automation'
decisions.rationale: Pre-processor wedge avoids direct competition, creates new category, and complements existing GRC platforms rather than competing. The distinction is existential for positioning, regulatory risk, and auditor acceptance.
alternatives: Full AI compliance automation platform (rejected — competitive suicide)
Stay in current evidence-prep lane only (rejected — leaves growth on table)

dependencies.name: Phase 1 DoD closure (mutation wiring)
dependencies.resolution: Susan Embry validations + Lovable build sprint

dependencies.name: Cortex 02.10 prompt template for evidence completeness
dependencies.resolution: Joel Embry: define prompt + cost model

dependencies.name: Optimo Ventures SOC 2 Type I
dependencies.resolution: Dog-food OptimoEvidence for own compliance; 6-12 month timeline

risks.description: Vanta/Drata/AuditBoard build evidence quality features, eliminating channel partner thesis
risks.mitigation: Move fast; establish auditor portal as defensible position before incumbents recognize gap

risks.description: Enterprise procurement catch-22: cannot sell compliance software without SOC 2; need customers to justify SOC 2 investment
risks.mitigation: Complete own SOC 2 Type I; target mid-market where requirement is softer

risks.description: AI produces incorrect evidence assessment → customer audit failure → lawsuit
risks.mitigation: Disclaimers; confidence scoring; human-in-the-loop; E&O insurance

risks.description: Lovable + Supabase cannot meet enterprise security requirements (on-prem, FedRAMP, SAML, data residency)
risks.mitigation: Enterprise security architect review before Phase 2; consider backend split

constraints.description: No SOC 2 Type II certification — enterprise buyers require it
Lovable + Supabase + Vercel build standard (no exception approved)
No in-house compliance domain expert with SOX/SOC 2 evidence prep experience
No enterprise sales motion, SDR team, or channel partnerships
7 ventures in active build — portfolio capacity over-committed

successCriteria.metric: Auditor acceptance rate of pre-processed evidence packets
successCriteria.threshold: 80%+ after 3 pilots complete one audit cycle each

successCriteria.metric: Time saved per evidence collection cycle

successCriteria.threshold: 2+ paying customers within 6 months of launch
